scripts.surface: npm -w packages/next-plugin run build && cd demos/studio-app && npm run dev & sleep 3 && cd demos/studio-app && npx tsx ../../packages/surface/src/cli.ts
scripts.surface:screenshot: npm -w packages/next-plugin run build && cd demos/screenshot-app && npm run dev & sleep 3 && cd demos/screenshot-app && npx tsx ../../packages/surface/src/cli.ts
scripts.surface:design-system: npm -w packages/next-plugin run build && cd demos/design-system && npm run dev & sleep 3 && cd demos/design-system && npx tsx ../../packages/surface/src/cli.ts
scripts.surface:vite: npm -w packages/vite-plugin run build && cd demos/vite-app && npm run dev & sleep 3 && cd demos/vite-app && npx tsx ../../packages/surface/src/cli.ts
scripts.surface:css: npm -w packages/vite-plugin run build && cd demos/css-app && npm run dev & sleep 3 && cd demos/css-app && npx tsx ../../packages/surface/src/cli.ts
scripts.surface:css-modules: npm -w packages/vite-plugin run build && cd demos/css-modules-app && npm run dev & sleep 3 && cd demos/css-modules-app && npx tsx ../../packages/surface/src/cli.ts
scripts.surface:remix: npm -w packages/vite-plugin run build && cd demos/remix-app && npm run dev & sleep 3 && cd demos/remix-app && npx tsx ../../packages/surface/src/cli.ts
scripts.build:surface: npm -w packages/next-plugin run build && npm -w packages/surface run build
scripts.build: npm -w packages/next-plugin run build && npm -w packages/surface run build && npm -w packages/vite-plugin run build && npm -w packages/astro-plugin run build
